name: Ceramic Dagger
description: This short blade weapon was built using ceramic. It has limited range but comes out fast.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This short blade weapon was built using ceramic. It has limited range but comes out fast.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Innodem being able to equip Ceramic Dagger Rivens.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the new Ceramic Dagger PBR material not applying custom Energy color.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.3
patchlogs.changes: Scaled the Ceramic Dagger to a more reasonable size. Ceramic Dagger-But-Long-Like-A-Sword didn’t have a nice ring to it.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.changes: The Ceramic Dagger has received a new look! Previously it was identical to the Cronus.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: The Ceramic Dagger, Dark Dagger, Heat Dagger, Karyst and Sheev can now be used in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ceramic Dagger’s weapon trail not quite lining up with the blade as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/390688-poor-weapon-trail-animations-thread/
